mapper.update: /* TM_CL12001_Dao_saveWthtEqpSttusList */ MERGE INTO tm_cl12001 A USING ( SELECT #{ecsChrgDeptId} AS ecs_chrg_dept_id, #{iemDivNm} AS iem_div_nm, #{wthtSuplyBeginDe} AS wtht_suply_begin_de, #{eqpNm} AS eqp_nm, #{eqpCpcty} AS eqp_cpcty, #{invtCst} AS invt_cst, #{wthtUsefulYycnt} AS wtht_useful_yycnt, #{rmCtnt} AS rm_ctnt, #{frstRgstrId} AS frst_rgstr_id, #{lastUpdusrId} AS last_updusr_id, #{updtRsn} AS updt_rsn FROM DUAL ) B ON ( A.wtht_suply_begin_de = B.wtht_suply_begin_de AND A.eqp_nm = B.eqp_nm ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET A.ecs_chrg_dept_id = B.ecs_chrg_dept_id, A.iem_div_nm = B.iem_div_nm, A.eqp_cpcty = B.eqp_cpcty, A.invt_cst = B.invt_cst, A.wtht_useful_yycnt = B.wtht_useful_yycnt, A.rm_ctnt = B.rm_ctnt, A.last_updt_dt = SYSDATE, A.last_updusr_id = B.last_updusr_id, A.updt_rsn = B.updt_rsn WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( A.ecs_chrg_dept_id, A.iem_div_nm, A.wtht_suply_begin_de, A.eqp_nm, A.eqp_cpcty, A.invt_cst, A.wtht_useful_yycnt, A.rm_ctnt, A.frst_regist_dt, A.frst_rgstr_id, A.last_updt_dt, A.last_updusr_id, A.updt_rsn ) VALUES ( B.ecs_chrg_dept_id, B.iem_div_nm, B.wtht_suply_begin_de, B.eqp_nm, B.eqp_cpcty, B.invt_cst, B.wtht_useful_yycnt, B.rm_ctnt, SYSDATE, B.frst_rgstr_id, SYSDATE, B.last_updusr_id, B.updt_rsn )
